---
id: handle-create-tag
title: "Create a new tag"
description: "Creates a new tag manually without associating it with a link. Returns the updated tag list."

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/tags"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new tag manually without associating it with a link. Returns the updated tag list.
